div.p: Constraint: Virtual 0x0..4MB ≡ Physical 0x0..4MB Requirement: CR0.PG=1 transition safety

ol.li: PDE Creation: Allocate 4096 bytes for Page Directory.
Identity Map: Set PDE[0] to point to a Page Table mapping 0MB-4MB with V=P.
Load CR3: Move physical address of Page Directory into CR3.
Set PG: mov eax, cr0; or eax, 0x80000000; mov cr0, eax.
Synchronize: jmp to clear the prefetch queue.

div.p: Failure Scenario (No Identity Map): If V != P, the instruction fetch immediately following mov cr0, eax will attempt to load the instruction at the new Virtual address. If that isn't mapped to the current Physical instruction, it triggers a #PF (Page Fault). Since IDT isn't mapped, it converts to Triple Fault.
